---
title: "Consolidation exercises - Day1"
author: "Thiago Cordeiro-Almeida"
date: "2026-07-20"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Exercise 1

![](IMAGES_class/Exercise_Spain_provinceANDregions_map.png)

# Exercise 2

![](IMAGES_class/Exercise_Madrid_districtsANDcensustract_map.png)
